articles.title: Apple Reports Record Services Revenue
articles.summary: Apple posted record services revenue beating analyst expectations. Growth driven by App Store and iCloud.
articles.sentiment_reasoning: Record beat with raised guidance signals strong momentum.

articles.title: Tesla Misses Deliveries But Announces Affordable Model
articles.summary: Tesla missed delivery estimates but announced a new affordable model for 2025. Shares recovered after initial drop.
articles.sentiment_reasoning: Delivery miss is bearish but new model is a long-term bullish catalyst.
